body: Following the newfound insight from implementing `seawater_density`, I believe we always want to define these diagnostics to return `KernelFunctionOperation` rather than `Field`. This PR also fixes the incorrect use of TitleCase.
title: Refactor vertical vorticity to return operation rather than Field

body: I noticed that TKE is not masked because `compute_diffusivities!` follows `mask_immersed_field!` within `update_state!`.
title: Mask CATKE's TKE
[Reactant] feat: support new Reactant runtime IFRT
